creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
I prepared the port for f-spot 0.4.0. To get the most vital bugfixes,
	I patched the source to yesterday's svn "FSPOT_0_4_STABLE". (See
	http://mail.gnome.org/archives/f-spot-list/2007-August/msg00042.html
	for information on that).
	The new/updated port can be found at
	http://www.burggraben.net/hacks/fspot-040-070925.tar.gz
	The patch from the released f-spot 0.4.0 to FSPOT_0_4_STABLE is
	at http://www.burggraben.net/hacks/f-spot-vendor_070925.diff.gz
	and will be fetched as a PATCHFILE.
	I've tested this update on my system (whre it works quite well),
	so be careful...
